# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in ORIGO, please report it responsibly:

1. **Do NOT open a public issue**
2. Use GitHub's [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/NeaBouli/origo/security/advisories/new)
3. Or email the maintainer directly

We will respond within 48 hours and work with you on a fix before any public disclosure.

## Scope

- Server code (`server/`)
- Smart contract integrations
- Authentication / JWT handling
- WebSocket protocol
- GHIFR economy logic
